textContent:
Good day!

I am Michael Adrian Javier on behalf of Lance Adiel Mangulabnan to inform you that they live in an area out of electricity or internet for 5 days now and it may take a couple of days for the electricity to be restored. Due to this, it is probable that they would not be able to participate in future activities (assignments, quizzes, etc.). 

We hope that you take this into consideration and soften current and future requirements due to the situation they are in.

Thank you.
textContentHtml:
Good day!


I am Michael Adrian Javier on behalf of Lance Adiel Mangulabnan to inform you that they live in an area out of electricity or internet for 5 days now and it may take a couple of days for the electricity to be restored. Due to this, it is probable that they would not be able to participate in future activities (assignments, quizzes, etc.). 


We hope that you take this into consideration and soften current and future requirements due to the situation they are in.


Thank you.
